name: @tank/figma-to-code
description: Pixel-perfect Figma-to-code implementation. Extracts designs via Figma MCP, translates to CSS, builds design tokens, verifies fidelity. Covers auto-layout, responsive breakpoints, variants, and accessibility. Triggers: figma to code, design to code, figma implementation, pixel perfect, auto layout, design tokens, figma component, responsive design, CSS from figma, figma MCP, visual fidelity.
